generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for real-time point cloud data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual perception and depth data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraImageData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard vehicle speed sensor for ego vehicle velocity measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard steering angle sensor for vehicle steering input measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraImageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance LiDARPointData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted from physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Jetpack5SDK
]

instance DepthCameraImage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera images for visual perception"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraImageData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Jetpack5SDK
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed and steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks derived from point cloud and depth data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Jetpack5SDK
]

instance SQLVehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData, ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DBSCANPointCloudClustering : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based algorithm for clustering LiDAR point clouds into objects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Jetpack5SDK
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTracking : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking and motion prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Jetpack5SDK
]

instance ISO15622ACCLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant adaptive cruise control logic for speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, Cpp
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware enabling real-time communication between physical and digital twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Jetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for edge computing and AI processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for implementing data processing and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance real-time components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for control system design and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service for real-time visualization, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualization, DataSaving, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service for ACC system execution on digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlExecution
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service for enabling/disabling ACC, setting speed, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAutomatic, DisableACCAutomatic, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]

instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks, vehicle state, and projected driving path"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving vehicle state and object tracks to SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating reports from stored vehicle and object data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCControlExecution : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executing ACC control logic for speed adjustment based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAutomatic : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling ACC system via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAutomatic : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disabling ACC system via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed for ACC system via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Initiating emergency braking via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator for vehicle steering control"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DBSCANPointCloudClustering, KalmanFilterObjectTracking, ISO15622ACCLogic, SQLVehicleStateDatabase
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RemoteManagementService
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ROS2Middleware
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, steering adjustments, emergency braking signals) from the Digital Twin Entity to the Physical Twin Entity for actuation via ROS2 nodes."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms, as required by 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated through ISO 23247-based entities: Physical Twin Entity (sensor data processing), Digital Twin Entity (ACC computation, data storage), User Entity (visualization and control), and Cross-System Data Translation FE, interconnected via ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, supporting real-time monitoring and remote management of the vehicle's ACC system during operational use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; latency and synchronization validated per 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication; safety-critical system constraints enforced."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-component communication within the vehicle, and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication between physical and digital twin components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage hosted externally (cloud-based) for computation offloading and data retention."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT framework; ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy implementation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical operations with strict latency and synchronization requirements; remote emergency braking commands implemented with safety checks, but specific cybersecurity measures not detailed in the document."
]
